snippets.title: 2D scatter colored by class labels (matplotlib)
snippets.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA

X, y = load_iris(return_X_y=True)
Z = PCA(n_components=2, random_state=0).fit_transform(X)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 5))
for label in np.unique(y):
    mask = y == label
    ax.scatter(Z[mask, 0], Z[mask, 1], label=str(label), alpha=0.8, s=40)

ax.set_xlabel("Component 1")
ax.set_ylabel("Component 2")
ax.set_title("Iris in PCA-2D (colored by species)")
ax.legend(title="Species", frameon=False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
snippets.explanation: Canonical pattern: loop or vectorized coloring by discrete labels, alpha for overlap, legend with title. PCA here is only a coordinate source—see the PCA topic for the math.

snippets.title: UMAP coordinates with colorblind-safe palette
snippets.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from sklearn.datasets import load_digits
from umap import UMAP

X, y = load_digits(return_X_y=True)
Z = UMAP(n_components=2, random_state=0).fit_transform(X)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 6))
sc = ax.scatter(Z[:, 0], Z[:, 1], c=y, cmap="tab10", s=12, alpha=0.85)
cbar = plt.colorbar(sc, ax=ax, fraction=0.046, pad=0.04)
cbar.set_label("Digit class")

ax.set_xlabel("UMAP-1")
ax.set_ylabel("UMAP-2")
ax.set_title("Digits — UMAP (n_neighbors=15 default)")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
snippets.explanation: Use method name on axes; record UMAP hyperparameters in the title. Algorithm details live in the UMAP topic—this snippet owns the plotting layer.

snippets.title: Highlight misclassifications on an embedding
snippets.code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Z: (n, 2) embedding; y_true, y_pred: (n,) integer labels
wrong = y_pred != y_true

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 5))
ax.scatter(Z[~wrong, 0], Z[~wrong, 1], c=y_true[~wrong], cmap="Set2", alpha=0.5, s=30)
ax.scatter(Z[wrong, 0], Z[wrong, 1], facecolors="none", edgecolors="black", s=80, linewidths=1.2, label="Misclassified")

ax.legend()
ax.set_title("Embedding colored by true label; ring = error")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
snippets.explanation: Qualitative link to confusion-matrix analysis: errors become visible as hollow markers on the true-label coloring.

snippets.title: Save coordinates and metadata for reproducible figures
snippets.code:
import json
import numpy as np

meta = {
    "method": "umap",
    "params": {"n_neighbors": 15, "min_dist": 0.1, "random_state": 0},
    "n_points": int(Z.shape[0]),
}

np.savez(
    "embedding_export.npz",
    Z=Z,
    y_true=y,
    y_pred=y_pred if "y_pred" in dir() else np.array([]),
)
with open("embedding_export_meta.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(meta, f, indent=2)
snippets.explanation: Publication-quality workflow: persist coordinates, labels, and hyperparameters so figures can be regenerated without refitting.
